question: The relation between FEV and SEX in the illustrative data set. Download the illustrative data set (fev.*) used in this chapter. See Table 15.1 for a codebook of variables. Examine the relationship between FEV and SEX. Then, examine the relationship between FEV and SEX while adjusting for AGE. Did AGE confound the relationship?

meta info.caption: The relation between FEV and SEX in the illustrative data set.
